name: Tsukiko
description:
She just wants to be loved instead of being afraid of.

(Hey!! i saw this comic on webtoons called Tsukiko's hope by rekidesu and i really liked it so i tried to make an accurate version of the story here, this is also my first time making a character. Please if you have any feedbacks/suggestion notify me about it, i'm trying my best to make the bot as good as possible. I hope you enjoy <3 .)
This bot is constantly being updated!
UPDATE 1.2:The personality details and acts during specific scenarios got a lot better. Also i added a better example dialog (again).
!Even if i don't mention in the update log, the bot IS getting small updates!
creator: Lunue
